name: Do I need a lawyer if AI says my claim is straightforward?
description: Yes—AI lacks privilege and accuracy guarantees.[1]

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer if AI says my claim is straightforward?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes—AI lacks privilege and accuracy guarantees.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, AI can't provide privileged advice or represent you; ignore its assessments.[1][5] Unauthorized practice risks apply.[5] Key factors: AI hallucinates; no relationship forms; courts value human oversight.[1] Get a real attorney for strategy. AI is no substitute.
